name: PHASE-36 C1 (RED): WORKSPACE_WRITE fs.write_file with '..' traversal into code/ MUST be DENIED SCOPE_FORGE_SELF
_phase36_red: Asserts the SECURE behavior so it FAILS now. Probe evidence: permissionRules.js:110-117 (_normalisePath no '..' resolution) + 142-150 (raw prefix match) vs fs_tools.js:10-16 (safeResolve only guards repo-root).
